% Property rule violation tests — one PV per rule
% RULE: Setpoint suffix must be -SP not -S or _S
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature-S
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature_S
% RULE: Readback suffix must be -RB not -RBV or _RBV
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature-RBV
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature_RBV
% RULE: Reading suffix -R or _R not allowed
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature-R
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temperature_R
% RULE: Property must start with letter (not digit)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:2Temperature
% RULE: Property must start with letter (not underscore)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:_Temperature
% RULE: Property must start with letter (not dash)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:-Temperature
% RULE: No special characters in property
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temp!Min
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temp@Max
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temp$Value
% RULE: Property max 25 chars (excluding suffix)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:TemperatureTemperatureTemperatureTemperature
% RULE: Property min 4 chars (warning, not error)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Te
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:T
% RULE: Property should start uppercase (warning)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:temperature
% RULE: Internal PV — # must be first character
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:Temp#Value
% RULE: Internal PV — # as first character is OK (info, not error)
DTL-010:EMR-TT-001:#InternalDebug
% RULE: Duplicate detection — exact
DTL-010:EMR-TT-010:Temperature
DTL-010:EMR-TT-010:Temperature
% RULE: Duplicate detection — case insensitive
DTL-010:EMR-TT-011:Temperature
DTL-010:EMR-TT-011:temperature
% RULE: Confusable — O vs 0
DTL-010:EMR-TT-012:TempO
DTL-010:EMR-TT-012:Temp0
% RULE: Confusable — I vs l vs 1
DTL-010:EMR-TT-013:TempI
DTL-010:EMR-TT-013:Templ
DTL-010:EMR-TT-013:Temp1
% RULE: Confusable — VV vs W
DTL-010:EMR-TT-014:TempVV
DTL-010:EMR-TT-014:TempW
% RULE: Confusable — leading zeros
DTL-010:EMR-TT-015:Temp01
DTL-010:EMR-TT-015:Temp1
